---
name: Request for Comments (RFC)
about: Propose a significant design or architectural change
title: "[RFC] "
labels: rfc
assignees: ""
---

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve, and for whom?

## Design Proposal

Describe the proposed architecture, API, or workflow. Include:

- Interfaces (types, function signatures, data models)
- Data flow diagrams (text-based is fine)
- Integration points with existing components

## Tradeoffs

What are the pros and cons of this approach?

| Pro | Con |
| --- | --- |
| ... | ... |
| ... | ... |

## Open Questions

What decisions remain to be made? What information is missing?

## Alternatives

What other approaches were considered, and why was this one chosen?
